summary: JG12 Iteration 12 - All features tested and working. Dashboard trackers show real consumed vs target (0/190 P, 0/170 H, 0/60 G when no diet). RoutinePage shows empty state with 'SIN RUTINA ASIGNADA'. /api/calculator/distribute endpoint working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Client login works
✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/{today} - Returns {exists: false} when no diet
✅ Backend: GET /api/diets/{past_date} - Returns {exists: false}
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/distribute (training) - Returns correct meal distribution
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/distribute (rest) - Returns correct rest day distribution
✅ Backend: POST /api/calculator/distribute (3 meals) - Works with different meal counts
✅ Backend: GET /api/routines/current - Returns null when no routine
✅ Backend: GET /api/routines/history - Returns empty list
✅ Backend: GET /api/macros - Returns correct macros (P=190/225, H=170, G=60, Peri=45P/50H, source=auto)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 'HOY · ENTRENO' header
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard circular trackers show 0/190 P, 0/170 H, 0/60 G
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 0/1980 kcal consumed vs target
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard progress bars show consumed/target (P 0/190, H 0/170, G 0/60)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard bottom row shows 'ENTRENO: 1980 KCAL · DESCANSO: 2120 KCAL · PERI: 45P/50H'
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard 'AUTO' badge visible for auto-calculated macros
✅ Frontend: Click on macro-trackers-card navigates to /dashboard/nutrition
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage shows 'SIN RUTINA ASIGNADA' empty state
✅ Frontend: RoutinePage has data-testid='routine-page' (fixed)
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage loads with /api/calculator/distribute data
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage shows meal cards (C1, Intra, Post, C2, C3, C4) with correct macros
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage day summary shows P: 0/235g, H: 0/220g, G: 0/60g
✅ Frontend: Mobile navigation visible and working
✅ Frontend: Mobile dashboard shows circular trackers correctly
critical_code_review_comments: ClientDashboard.jsx: Well-implemented CircularTracker component with SVG animations
ClientDashboard.jsx: Correctly fetches /api/diets/{today} and calculates consumed macros from comidas
ClientDashboard.jsx: Properly handles case when no diet exists (consumed = 0)
RoutinePage.jsx: Clean empty state UI with 'SIN RUTINA ASIGNADA' message
routes/calculator.py: /distribute endpoint correctly reads macros from profile and distributes
routes/diets.py: GET /{fecha} returns {exists: false} when no diet found
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts with pre-configured macros
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested. Dashboard now shows real consumed vs target macros by fetching /api/diets/{today}. When no diet exists, consumed shows 0. RoutinePage shows empty state when no routine assigned. /api/calculator/distribute endpoint working correctly for meal macro distribution. Client demo has macros: Entreno P=190 H=170 G=60 (1980kcal), Descanso P=225 H=170 G=60 (2120kcal), Peri P=45 H=50. All data-testids verified.
